name: DropdownButton

examples.title: Variants
examples.code:
<DropdownButton Text="Default">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>
<DropdownButton Text="Secondary" Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Secondary">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>
<DropdownButton Text="Outline" Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<DropdownButton Text="Small" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>
<DropdownButton Text="Default">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>
<DropdownButton Text="Large" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Lg">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>

mdSummary:
# DropdownButton

| DropdownButton | Size | `Button.ButtonSize` | `Button.ButtonSize.Default` |  |
| DropdownButton | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| DropdownButton | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
